speaker: MATT
raw_text: 23, okay. Over the next 15 or so minutes, as you go through and begin to gather the corpses, most of the skeletons out here that have armor on, it's old, rusted, destroyed, broken armor, and the weapons either fell apart in the battle against you or are just barely usable or functional at this point in time. Of the various cultists' bodies, the armor on the black guard that you were battling is a pretty nice-looking set of full plate. You also find similar symbols, these dark iron necklaces that you found on the previous cultists.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, no, actually, because when you used your wings outside, you guys came inside. Did you use your wings during the battle?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Did you guys take a long rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We did, because we had the mansion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did. So by this conversation happening, the rummaging through the bodies, inspecting the vicinity, I'd say you maybe have 20 more minutes on your wings.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, did we rummage through the bodies? Let's rummage through those bodies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did, that's how you found the objects.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: While they rummage, Keyleth wants to test the radius.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, we found the objects on that cart.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right, you found them on the cart. You did not actually rummage through the bodies.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is there anything on the bodies?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, that was high. 23.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Just as a breeze blows a bit of a dust cloud through, which coats your sticky hands with heavy desert sand. You chew for a minute and feel the crunch of granules inside your mouth where you inhaled. (crunching)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You know, I've found if fruit, when it goes bad, falls from the tree, and it's still on it! Therefore!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And when fruit goes bad, it turns into wine!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You get crunk drunk!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I think I'm going to wait for Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to have a bite.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You take a bite and it's got a fairly moist center. You can see now, like a cactus, the fruits here, most of the moisture is retained within these fruit elements. The flavor, it's not sweet, it's quite pungent, actually. It has a bitterness to it. It's like putting your tongue in a bunch of lye.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Does it taste good?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (disgusted noises)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Maybe make some mayonnaise or something? Want some mayonnaise to cleanse your palate?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I take out the jug and I go  honey! Hey!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, all right!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just a couple of sticky warriors.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No, Grog!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, as you glance around and do a pass over the next 20 minutes or so. It's as fast as you can, but it takes you a while to scan and get a feel for it. You do see what looks to be, because you felt the wind was coming through from the interior, you see a small well-like crevasse where the rocks have collapsed inward. You can see, glancing over the top, the dark, five, six-foot-wide hole that leads deeper into the mountain.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Jug goes away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Back to you guys. You were looking for the other entrance?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, up top.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Both of us are looking for it. We're flying up. Can you fly? So, we can fly up. I was going to help you look for it because I figure you have a better ability to collapse it than I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What form are you going to take?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A goldfish!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You could hold me in your hands. I've got about 30 seconds. Just to fly up? Can I ride side-saddle with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course you can, yes! Put your arms around me, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay! Your abs are nice, Vex!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, I work out a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Have you been working out over the past year? Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, who's helming the investigation of this? And you're aiding her, so go ahead and take it with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Same thing. 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. I left on my collapsing music.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They die.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You continue southward, scooting. You can sense the very exterior of the wall that leads to this path, so you're staying away from it as you glide through the rock and earth. Eventually, you come close to the very top, breaching the dome that leads down into the chamber where you had your battle naught but an hour ago. As you poke your face through, you're looking down, you can see the dark sphere there, hovering. You can see the large pyramid structure below it, probably about 60 feet below you. You can see the entrance to the tunnel that leads into here. There is a small ladder up along the wall that previously you didn't notice because of the lack of light and attention to the ceiling portion. But people were either climbing up into or climbing down from.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't hit any traps!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right! Looking for traps! That's okay, 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15. Okay. You get about a third of the way down, and you realize that one of the platforms that you can land on has, uncharacteristically, a softer cushion to it. Everything else is just stone slabs. This one has almost--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Waterbed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! (laughs) Like a spring air mattress, it's crazy. No, it's like a woven, dried palm frond-like cloth that's rested over it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure it's nothing. Probably nothing. Just leave it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just a drop-through? Can I, like-- fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't fuck with anything, Keyleth. Just collapse it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I found, like a, it might be a roof or--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I bet Clarota's in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What? Piranhas? I don't know if piranhas are in rocks, but there might be something else in there. There might be piranhas. Oh, I'll avoid it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You emerge a little over an hour or so of doing this. You emerge from the top. You watch as Keyleth (rock impacts), looking like a large version of Fantastic Four's Thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (unintelligible grumbling)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Get the fuck out!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I try and say, like, well, I know it's about 180 feet because I tested before, so I'm trying to be conscious of it. And then I back up a little bit, and I go over to where that tunnel was, and I start collapsing it down. As I work my way up, I'm going (impacts).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Easily enough. You go by and you start kicking through the tunnel as you go. You can sense near proximity where any of the various weak points are in the stone. Systematically go through it, collapse it, piece by piece, until eventually most of the tunnel is useless and unusable.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's like a platformer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How long can you maintain your wild shape?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Half of my level, or something like that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you're fine, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or it's a third of my level? Still several hours.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You guys arrive. It's early evening. You can see the windows of nearby homes, shops, and various structures near the square are beginning to glow from the interior light of small lanterns and candles. In the distance, you can see the perimeter beacons being put along the castle walls on the exterior of Castle Whitestone. You're back home.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't see any similarities." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's everything I wanted. I'm good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Through the tree, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Through the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as you finish concentrating on the outside of one of these large, 15 to 20-foot-tall, leafless, fruit-bearing trees in the center of the Smoldercrown Forest, the doorway shifts open, revealing on the opposite side the dark, sunless night of Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I pick a blossom from the tree on the way out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I pull two of the fruits.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You make your way down there, and you can see it's still fairly dark in that chamber. Most of the lights have been snuffed except for a few torches that are set around the central platform that was built about mid-height on the ziggurat, where you guys had the council meeting with Raishan that one time, and where most of the research is being done there. Up top, you see a number of guards, the Pale Guard are assigned to keep watch. You see Jecht, the manservant of the Realmseer Eskil there, as well. Currently, you see Eskil Ryndarien is spreading out his thick scrolls and books, and they're all across the big central wooden table, and he has his thick spectacles on, and he has a number of candles already set up, and he's deep into getting his space prepped and acquiring whatever information he'd put away since the investigation was put on hold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He is. He's currently inspecting the ziggurat again. He's setting his notes up where he previously set up research quarters during the incursion of the Conclave."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We need to get everyone away from it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Where's Allura?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "She's in Emon. She's still part of the council there."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have to get her here immediately.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is Gilmore still in town?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, he's back in Emon."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He left for good?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to run down to the ziggurat and try to get Eskil Ryndarien away from it and warn everyone to stay away from it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's double-check that armor for any weird influences it may have, to make sure it is what it seems to be, which is ornamental, with a bit of magic. Let's make sure that the captain of whatever guard is on shift down by the ziggurat is wearing it, and is aware that he's there to befuddle the enemy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Yes? Oh, it has been some time, Lady Vex'ahlia. I've heard you've come up in the world."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Eskil?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Oh! You're right. I didn't know that. I've only spent six months with the thing!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Eskil?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes? Oh, it has been some time, Lady Vex'ahlia. I've heard you've come up in the world."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yes. I'm a lady now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Wondrous. Yes. What do I have the honor?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but I'm afraid being down here isn't safe anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right, so you brought me all the way out here, and now I can't do my work? That's great. No, that's par for the course. It's basically most of my life."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Plenty of work up top, away from this orb of death. It's very dangerous.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Grand Poobah, if this is indeed your request, they will do their very best to do so. Within an hour or so, you are presented with a bowl of various textures of shredded, cured, and prepared meats to loosely resemble a salad, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking. I'll meet you in the library.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM

preceding_turns.text: Is that Hercules Mulligan?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This is a tiny Hercules Mulligan. I was looking for him! He's been in here the whole time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.text: He's a barbarian, I think it is. We have to work out the 5e classes for the Hamilton characters. Get on it, Critters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll let everyone know where I am, too. I'm in the library reading if anybody needs me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anyone else wishing to accomplish anything else?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm in the kitchen. I want to see if they can make a salad with meat in it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If they figure out how, bring some up to the library.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm not very up to--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Deposit it up.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We have two-week salted goat meat. On top of that we have hickory-kept long angle-smoked fish guts mixed in there with a wondrous mix of minced steaks, we've spared no possible expense on the various pieces of the cow. We've, from that point forward, presented a sprinkling of pork belly that's been ground up and salt-cured as well over the period of about two months usually kept to our various steam meals, but I thought this was a special occasion."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Chef, this is going to put you on the map. We need to name it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, well, Grand Poobah, I image that would be your honor to give. I am but humbled to present you with such a meal, so the choice is yours."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What fine tender meats are in this dish?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, well, we've got quite a variety. I wanted to provide an extravagant walk through the various creatures that we prepare here in Whitestone. Would you like me to continue?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Please, yes! I'm talking to myself.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. With a constitution check it might improve your speed. All right. So. What else do you wish to do, as it is now getting close to the midnight hour here at Whitestone?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: GoFiBePo.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: GoFiBePo.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Even better. And I'll just start hand-smashing into my face this delicious salted meat collection.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm hungry now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Oh, it is delightful. It is delicious.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You should not be able to make up food that delicious just on the fly like that. I literally felt like I was at a fucking restaurant. That was absurd.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to eat it!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: As I was saying 'Grand Poobah', I knew it was going to bite me in the ass. I don't know how.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Meat salad. You're welcome.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It actually sounds really good. Cured goat meat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And it's currently being submitted to the senate of Whitestone for approval to become the official dish.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! After every battle, we'll get all the protein we need and we'll just fart our happy asses off, all night long.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's all shabu-shabu from here on out.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So as you guys rested for the evening and found yourself the following morning, presenting the possibility of making your way into the Shadowfell and what waits for you there. You come to consciousness, you have your morning meal, you begin to plot and plan. What do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you say gay-bone?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's the Gabon. Gabon?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, so for that contest you need to come over to Twitch chat, and I've actually forgotten what word we chose for today.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Scorsese.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) What was the word? Thank you. Whisper. The word is whisper. So go ahead and when prompted, enter "whisper" into the chat room to enter, and we'll come back after the break to announce who the lucky winner is. We'll see you guys in a few minutes. (cheering) [break]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello, everyone, and welcome back to Critical Role. Oh god, they're closer now. I'm starting to rethink this scenario.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Life comes at you fast, Matt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That it does, apparently. Anyway, welcome back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think that was the best one I've ever heard, though, Ashley. That was a really good one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You may fight one later. (laughter)

speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.text: Hello, everyone, and welcome back to Critical Role. Oh god, they're closer now. I'm starting to rethink this scenario.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You find him. It's early morning. They've finished their early round of training for the morning, and some of the early Pale Guard recruits are in the process of rushing off and taking a small lunch break. He's currently taking a lot of the equipment from the training grounds and setting it aside in the various weapon racks, and generally cleaning up the space as you approach. He looks over his shoulder as he sets some of the practice blades along the edge.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How much?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I just have a vial of it. I don't know how much that is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's good for two applications, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Probably good for two applications.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Three applications with the vial that you have.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, this one has a little bit missing? How much? Because this is less than it normally is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Look, you've already done some good business with me. I'll give it to you for 150."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But you have to sign this poster. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: For my Hawaiian poke bowl mascot. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I would eat there all the time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 150 gold. Sure. Only because Percy gave me a look. You know what-- yeah, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's going to keep trying to listen to one word.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A lot to unpack here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm not hearing music. We'll check that in a second. Anybody else want to prepare anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I want to track down Kynan for a minute.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 22 points of necrotic damage. So as you leap into the sphere, you feel as if the gravity that holds you to the ground, or sometimes the ceiling, bends around you and your limbs are wrenched forward, like someone has you in a full Nelson that doesn't end. Your body is about to be condensed and crushed, when you feel the symbol pulse, and the gravity lessens somewhat. It's still tearing into you, and you feel this coldness and this numbness come over your body, as you feel like you're a square peg being pushed through a round hole, physically pushed through against your will. You begin to yell out in pain instinctually before it comes to a stop and you all land to your feet, out of breath. The numbness begins to fade to immediate pins and needles, just pain across your entire body. You feel like someone just raked a number of tacks across every surface of your skin and as the pain begins to throb, you can feel the blood pulsing throughout your body as it all shoots to the surface. You still sense that you, thanks to your symbols around your neck, you managed to withstand a much more dangerous arrival. As your eyes focus, you already feel the chilled air that surrounds you, like a cold, cold winter morning. The sky above is sunless and gray, like an overcast horizon without clouds to texture it, breached by distant mountain ranges like so much broken glass. You see behind you immediately the other corresponding siphon, floating, bright gray-white in color and glowing, the same color that you saw briefly shifted to in the ziggurat near Ank'harel. Beneath it, you find shards of ruined objects, piles of long-dead bodies, flesh and bone rended and twisted like they'd been put through some rapid tornado on different sides of their body. And you see a lot of these shattered pieces of wood and metal were all a number of objects that were thrown in here during the experimental phase when you guys first uncovered this. You look around and notice that you stand atop a rectangular platform of dark, smooth stone, about 15 feet on each side. Beneath the edges, about 20 feet down, 'til it comes to the ground. So you're on an elevated stone platform that the siphon is affixed to above, floating about four feet above the top of the surface. And you look down to the ground immediately around you and you see just dry, cracked badlands. It seems to spread out, making up the majority of the Shadowfell around you. Surrounding your location, your sight clarifies to see what appears to be hundreds of buildings and structures that form this shade of an ancient city, like a town, a sprawling village. Half the structures toppled and destroyed, piles of rubble and rock. The ground itself seems to jut up in places, these tiny, shooting spires of black and gray earth that the city has either been built around or seemed to have grown through. As you look past that, you see movement throughout the streets in the distance, but before you can focus on that, your vision immediately sticks towards, in the center of this circular-like city, the standing, ominous, commanding, massive spire of obsidian black, familiar to both of you through two different types of vision you've experienced. A jagged monolith that exudes ancient hatred, encircled by dozens of dark, winged beasts that watch over the dreary skies. Who here is proficient in history?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I do not understand the details, but for many months now, these siphons, they have been building the seed. They have been preparing for his return. And from there, he will complete what he started so long ago."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What ritual? What is the ritual going to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What will the ritual do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The ritual is to restore him. To bring him, so that he can complete the main purpose. The ritual of seeding."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's just a farmer, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How does Delilah factor into it? What does she get out of it? What does she do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think he knows all of the intricacies.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know, but he's probably promised them all something.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What has Delilah promised you? What do you gain out of this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "When he, the Undying King, returns to this world, and we bring what we have gained, what we have brought from the other plane, that seed will be taken to the ritual of the space."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What have they brought?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you bring something through the portal? What was it?
